title: anachusis #0401
definition:
1) an overflowing, a pouring out
 2) metaph. the excess (flood) of riot in which a dissolute life
    pours itself forth
nasbUsage:

 2) metaph. the excess (flood) of riot in which a dissolute life
    pours itself forth
